other_observers: none; Duane Nelson and Stan Oswald find bird on 12/15/06
specific_location: West Valco Pond halfway between Rocky Ford and Swink (or is that Stink)
description: This is a duck with an all rufous head, buffy forehead, gray bill with dark tip, gray back and gray flanks. Very contrasty white vent with black undertail coverts, light rufous breast.Behaviors: Loafing on reservoir with American Widgeons, Redheads, Common Mergansers and others.Call: none heardPlumage: adult male
